---
title: "COVID LMR — Analysis (Results Section 6: Drug Redundancy)"
output: html_document
---

# Section 6 — Drug redundancy after WHO stop dates

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# ---- Paths ----
in_dir    <- "../data/final"
plots_dir <- "../plots"
if (!dir.exists(plots_dir)) dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- Helper functions ----
clean_id <- function(x) str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
parse_dmy_safe <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "na", "n/a", "unknown", "-99")] <- NA
  suppressWarnings(dmy(x))
}

# ---- Load data (if not already in session from earlier scripts) ----
if (!exists("pharma_table")) {
  rdata_in <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^covid_lmr_clean7_\\d{8}\\.RData$", full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(rdata_in) >= 1)
  rdata_in <- rdata_in[which.max(file.info(rdata_in)$mtime)]
  load(rdata_in)

  cat("Loaded:", basename(rdata_in), "\n")
  study_table   <- study_table   %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  pharma_table  <- pharma_table  %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  pharma_table <- pharma_table %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  country_table <- country_table %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
  arm_table     <- arm_table     %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
}

# Ensure reg_date is parsed in pharma_table even if loaded from a prior script
if (!"reg_date" %in% names(pharma_table)) {
  pharma_table <- pharma_table %>% mutate(reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
}

# ---- WHO / NIH stop dates ----
stop_dates <- tibble(
  plot_group = c("Hydroxychloroquine", "Ivermectin", "Lopinavir/Ritonavir",
                 "Convalescent Plasma", "Zinc", "Vitamin C"),
  stop_date  = as.Date(c("2020-07-04", "2021-03-31", "2020-07-04",
                          "2021-12-07", "2021-02-11", "2021-02-11")),
  stop_label = c("WHO Stop (Jul '20)", "WHO Stop (Mar '21)", "WHO Stop (Jul '20)",
                 "WHO Stop (Dec '21)", "NIH Against (Feb '21)", "NIH Against (Feb '21)")
)

# ---- Phase colour palette ----
phase_colors <- c(
  "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"  = "#4575b4",
  "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)" = "#d73027"
)

# ---- Shared theme ----
theme_redundancy <- function(base_size = 14) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text               = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "#666666"),
      legend.position    = "top",
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 12, 12, 12)
    )
}

# ---- Unified plot function ----
plot_drug_redundancy <- function(data, group_name, subtitle = NULL) {
  stop_info <- stop_dates %>% filter(plot_group == group_name)

  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = reg_date, y = phase_simple, color = phase_simple)) +
    geom_jitter(height = 0.2, width = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = stop_info$stop_date, linetype = "dashed",
               color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    annotate("text", x = stop_info$stop_date + 20, y = 2.4,
             label = stop_info$stop_label, hjust = 0, color = "red", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y",
                 limits = as.Date(c("2020-01-01", "2025-12-31"))) +
    scale_color_manual(values = phase_colors) +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("Figure 6. Redundancy check: ", group_name),
      subtitle = subtitle,
      x = NULL, y = NULL, color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_redundancy()

  fname <- paste0("fig6_redundancy_", str_to_lower(str_replace_all(group_name, "[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "_")), ".png")
  ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, fname), p, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  print(p)
}
```

## WHO-discredited drugs — trials registered after stop dates

```{r fig6_who_drugs, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ── Hydroxychloroquine / Chloroquine ──────────────────────────────────────────
hcq_data <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(drug_std %in% c("hydroxychloroquine", "chloroquine")) %>%
  mutate(plot_group = "Hydroxychloroquine")

# ── Ivermectin ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ivm_data <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(drug_std == "ivermectin") %>%
  mutate(plot_group = "Ivermectin")

# ── Convalescent Plasma ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cp_data <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(drug_class == "Convalescent plasma" | label == "Immunotherapy (Conv. Plasma)") %>%
  mutate(plot_group = "Convalescent Plasma")

# ── Lopinavir/Ritonavir (arms containing both drugs) ─────────────────────────
lop_arms <- pharma_table %>% filter(drug_std == "lopinavir")  %>% select(st_reg_id, arm_id)
rit_arms <- pharma_table %>% filter(drug_std == "ritonavir")  %>% select(st_reg_id, arm_id)
combo_arms <- inner_join(lop_arms, rit_arms, by = c("st_reg_id", "arm_id"))

lpv_data <- pharma_table %>%
  semi_join(combo_arms, by = c("st_reg_id", "arm_id")) %>%
  distinct(st_reg_id, arm_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(plot_group = "Lopinavir/Ritonavir")

# ── Combine and classify phase ────────────────────────────────────────────────
who_drug_data <- bind_rows(hcq_data, ivm_data, cp_data, lpv_data) %>%
  filter(!is.na(reg_date), reg_date >= "2020-01-01", reg_date <= "2025-12-31") %>%
  mutate(
    phase_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(phase_simple != "Other")

# ── Generate one plot per drug ────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (g in unique(who_drug_data$plot_group)) {
  plot_drug_redundancy(
    data       = who_drug_data %>% filter(plot_group == g),
    group_name = g,
    subtitle   = "Trials after the red line registered despite WHO recommendation against use"
  )
}
```

## NIH-discredited supplements — Zinc and Vitamin C

```{r fig6_supplements, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
supplements_data <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(str_detect(str_to_lower(drug_std), "zinc|vitamin c|ascorbic")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(reg_date), reg_date >= "2020-01-01", reg_date <= "2025-12-31") %>%
  mutate(
    phase_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    plot_group = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(drug_std), "zinc")           ~ "Zinc",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(drug_std), "vitamin c|ascorbic") ~ "Vitamin C",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(phase_simple != "Other", plot_group != "Other")

for (g in unique(supplements_data$plot_group)) {
  plot_drug_redundancy(
    data       = supplements_data %>% filter(plot_group == g),
    group_name = g,
    subtitle   = "Trials after the red line registered despite NIH recommendation against use"
  )
}
```
